input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.6.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.6.1.9
            TITLE: the driver must be protected from failure of the cylinder/tank and regulator

            CONTENT:
            rule T.6.1.9: The driver must be protected from failure of the cylinder/tank and regulator
T.6.1.9 The driver must be protected from failure of the cylinder/tank and regulator

RULE: t.6.1.1
            TITLE: working gas - the working gas must be non flammable

            CONTENT:
            rule T.6.1.1: Working Gas - The working gas must be non flammable
T.6.1.1 Working Gas - The working gas must be non flammable

RULE: t.6.1.4
            TITLE: lines and fittings - the gas lines and fittings must be appropriate for the maximum possible

            CONTENT:
            rule T.6.1.4: Lines and Fittings - The gas lines and fittings must be appropriate for the maximum possible
T.6.1.4 Lines and Fittings - The gas lines and fittings must be appropriate for the maximum possible 
operating pressure of the system.

RULE: t.6.1.5
            TITLE: insulation - the gas cylinder/tank must be insulated from any heat sources

            CONTENT:
            rule T.6.1.5: Insulation - The gas cylinder/tank must be insulated from any heat sources
T.6.1.5 Insulation - The gas cylinder/tank must be insulated from any heat sources

RULE: t.6.1
            TITLE: compressed gas cylinders and lines

            CONTENT:
            rule T.6.1: Compressed Gas Cylinders and Lines
T.6.1 Compressed Gas Cylinders and Lines 
Any system on the vehicle that uses a compressed gas as an actuating medium must meet the 
following:
